keys.description: The hot-path counter. Atomic INCR on every consume(). Period bucket encodes the reset window (e.g. `2026-07` for monthly, `2026` for yearly).
keys.notes: No TTL — reset via explicit DEL on period boundary. Redis persistence enabled.

keys.description: Cached value_cap for a workspace + key. Read on every enforce().
Compiled EntitlementRegistry — discovered #[Entitlement] declarations across every module.
Complete key→value_cap map for a workspace. Read on GET /api/auth/me for quota_summary.
invalidatedBy: Any Entitlement mutation for this workspace
